S.FORM: Muggsy Bogues 1 bulad 9 demiad, 1965 a mihca, Muggsy Bogues, miunduay.
S.PHON: muggsj boguəs * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, muggsj boguəs, miunduaj.
